metadata.name: Handle Request for Bulk Waste Pickup

description: A citizen requests a special pickup for large items (e.g., furniture, appliances) via the city's service portal.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Bulk Waste Pickup' request, including the citizen's address and a list of items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the service request details.

nodes.task_description: Schedule the pickup with the sanitation department's special collections crew.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the pickup for the next available date.

nodes.task_description: Notify the citizen of the confirmed pickup date and instructions on where to place the items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a confirmation and instructions to the citizen.
